zh.Brodick Castle, Abernethy, Perthshire, S: 英國蘇格蘭培爾阿波內
zh.Abernathy, Fifeshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾阿波內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Menteith於大約1276年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾阿波內時，她的父親Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith32歲，母親Matilda Strathearn11274歲。她於大約1290年與Alexander de Abernethy在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾阿波內結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她於1311年被列為lady of the court to queen isabella of england。她去世於1325年在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Menteith于大约1276年出生在英国苏格兰培爾阿波內时，她的父亲Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith32岁，母亲Matilda Strathearn11274岁。她于大约1290年与Alexander de Abernethy在苏格兰音巴內-爾阿波內结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她于1311年被列为lady of the court to queen isabella of england。她去世于1325年在苏格兰培爾阿波內享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾阿波內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Menteith was born about 1276, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, was 32 and her mother, Matilda Strathearn, was 11274. She married Alexander de Abernethy about 1290, in Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. In 1311, at the age of 36, her occupation is listed as lady of the court to queen isabella of england. She died in 1325, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 50, and was buried in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Menteith est née environ 1276, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Matilda Strathearn, avait 11274 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander de Abernethy environ 1290, à Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. En 1311, à l’âge de 36 ans, la profession de sa indiquée est lady of the court to queen isabella of england. Elle est décédée en 1325, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Menteith um 1276 in Abernethy, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith 32 und ihre Mutter Matilda Strathearn 11274. Sie hat um 1290 in Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland Alexander de Abernethy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. 1311, als sie 36 Jahre alt war, war ihr Beruf als lady of the court to queen isabella of england aufgeführt. Sie starb 1325 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Menteith è nata il circa 1276 nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Matilda Strathearn, aveva 11274 anni. Lei sposato Alexander de Abernethy circa 1290, nel Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Nel 1311, all'età di 36 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lady of the court to queen isabella of england. Morì nel 1325, nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Menteithが約1276年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで生まれた時，父Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteithは32歳，母Matilda Strathearnは11274歳であった。約1290年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアアバーネシーでAlexander de Abernethyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。1311年，36歳の時，職業はlady of the court to queen isabella of englandと記録されている。彼女は1325年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで50歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Menteith(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Strathearn(은)는 11274세였다. 그녀는 대략 1290년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 압어네시에서 Alexander de Abernethy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1311년, 36세의 나이로 그녀의 직업은 lady of the court to queen isabella of england이었다. 그녀는 1325년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Menteith nasceu aproximadamente 1276, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Strathearn, tinha 11274 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander de Abernethy aproximadamente 1290, em Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Em 1311, com 36 anos, sua profissão aparece como lady of the court to queen isabella of england. Ela faleceu em 1325, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Menteith родилась около 1276 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Strathearn, 11274. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander de Abernethy около 1290 г. в местности абирнети, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. В 1311 году, в возрасте 36 лет,  она работала по профессии lady of the court to queen isabella of england. Она умерла в 1325 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Menteith nació aproximadamente 1276, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Matilda Strathearn, tenía 11274 años. Se casó con Alexander de Abernethy aproximadamente 1290, en Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. En 1311, a la edad de 36 años, su ocupación registrada era lady of the court to queen isabella of england. Murió en 1325, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland.
